data.title: SoftBank and Ampere Computing jointly tested running a small AI model using a CPU.
data.description: According to foreign media reports, SoftBank and Ampere Computing have launched a joint project aimed at improving the efficiency of CPUs running small artificial intelligence models. The two companies plan to create a low-latency, high-efficiency inference environment as a key technology for next-generation AI infrastructure.

data.title: India's Demographic Dividend at Risk Amid Education and Skill Challenges
data.description:
India's Chief Economic Advisor, V. Anantha Nageswaran, has warned that the country may miss out on its demographic dividend and face increasing inequality if urgent action is not taken to improve education and skill development. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Nageswaran's concerns about the potential consequences of failing to address these critical areas.

Nageswaran emphasized the importance of equipping the workforce with necessary skills to harness the benefits of India's young population. He noted that without significant improvements in education and vocational training, the nation could struggle to achieve sustainable economic growth.

The advisor's comments come amid ongoing discussions about India's economic trajectory and the need for reforms to support its burgeoning population. Nageswaran stressed that addressing these issues is crucial for ensuring equitable growth and reducing disparities across different segments of society.

India's demographic advantage, characterized by a large proportion of young people, presents an opportunity for economic expansion. However, Nageswaran cautioned that this potential could be undermined by inadequate educational infrastructure and insufficient skill development initiatives.

The government has been urged to prioritize investments in education and training programs to prepare the workforce for future challenges. Nageswaran's remarks underscore the urgency of implementing policies that foster inclusive growth and capitalize on the demographic dividend.

As India navigates its economic future, the focus on education and skill development remains a pivotal factor in determining the country's ability to leverage its demographic strengths effectively.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Holders Urged to Secure Wallets Ahead of Spring Festival
data.description: Cryptocurrency holders are advised to dedicate 10 minutes to conduct a comprehensive security check on their wallets before the Spring Festival. According to NS3.AI, this precaution is crucial to ensure the safety of tokens while individuals enjoy time with family and friends during the holiday. The guidance is intended to help investors avoid common security risks that may occur due to distractions during festive periods.

data.title: Crypto protocol ZeroLend shuts down, saying it's ‘no longer sustainable’
data.description:
ZeroLend founder “Ryker” says several blockchains the lending protocol operates on are now “inactive,” leading to periods where it has operated at a loss.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-protocol-zerolend-shuts-down-no-longer-sustainable?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ripple CEO Predicts 80% Chance of CLARITY Act Passing by April
data.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has expressed optimism regarding the passage of the CLARITY Act by the end of April, estimating an 80% likelihood of success. According to NS3.AI, the bill is currently stalled in the Senate Banking Committee. However, ongoing high-level negotiations are underway to reach a consensus before the spring recess. Garlinghouse highlighted the importance of compromise to advance the bill, acknowledging it as an imperfect yet necessary step forward for the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Bitcoin Volatility May Rise Amid Record US Dollar Short Bets
data.description: Investor bets against the US dollar have reached their highest level since 2012, according to a Bank of America survey. According to NS3.AI, this trend diverges from historical patterns where a weaker dollar typically supported Bitcoin. Recent data from 2025 indicates a positive correlation between Bitcoin and the US Dollar Index. This correlation suggests that Bitcoin could experience increased volatility if a sharp rebound in the dollar occurs, potentially triggered by a short squeeze.

data.title: Australia's Liberal Opposition Leader Angus Taylor Announces Shadow Ministry
data.description: Australia's newly appointed Liberal opposition leader, Angus Taylor, has revealed the composition of his shadow ministry. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Taylor's strategic selections aimed at strengthening the party's position. The announcement comes as the Liberal Party seeks to redefine its policies and approach under Taylor's leadership. The shadow ministry includes a mix of experienced politicians and fresh faces, reflecting Taylor's vision for a dynamic and responsive opposition. This move is seen as a critical step in preparing the party for future electoral challenges and policy debates.

data.title: Treasuries Rally Continues as U.S. Bond Market Reopens
data.description: The rally in U.S. Treasuries that began last week persisted into Tuesday as the bond market resumed activity following a holiday. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing momentum in the bond market. This continued rally reflects investor sentiment and market dynamics as trading resumed. The reopening of the market saw sustained interest in Treasuries, indicating a strong demand for these government securities. The developments in the bond market are being closely monitored by investors and analysts alike, as they assess the implications for broader financial markets.

data.title: AI Summit Highlights Key Developments in Technology
data.description:
The AI Summit has unveiled significant advancements in artificial intelligence, drawing attention from industry leaders and experts. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the event's focus on the latest innovations and trends shaping the future of AI.

The summit featured discussions on the integration of AI in various sectors, emphasizing its potential to revolutionize industries such as healthcare, finance, and manufacturing. Experts shared insights on the ethical considerations and challenges associated with AI deployment, stressing the importance of responsible development and implementation.

Participants also explored the role of AI in enhancing productivity and efficiency, with case studies demonstrating successful applications in real-world scenarios. The event underscored the growing importance of AI in driving economic growth and competitiveness on a global scale.

Overall, the AI Summit provided a platform for thought leaders to exchange ideas and collaborate on strategies to harness the power of artificial intelligence for societal benefit.

data.title: Japan's Debt Issuance Projected to Rise by 28% by 2029
data.description: Japan's Ministry of Finance has projected a significant increase in the country's bond issuance by the fiscal year 2029. According to Jin10, the anticipated rise is attributed to escalating debt issuance costs. The forecast suggests that Japan's bond issuance could reach 38 trillion yen by 2029, marking a 28% increase compared to the fiscal year 2026. This projection highlights the growing financial pressures faced by Japan as it navigates rising costs associated with its debt management strategy.

data.title: Poland Urges Foreign Firms to Invest Locally for Defense Contracts
data.description: Poland is encouraging foreign companies to invest locally if they wish to participate in its substantial $281 billion defense spending plan. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Poland's strategy to bolster its defense capabilities while simultaneously boosting its domestic economy. The initiative is part of Poland's broader efforts to modernize its military infrastructure and enhance national security. By requiring foreign firms to invest in Poland, the government aims to create jobs and stimulate economic growth, ensuring that the defense spending benefits the local economy. This approach reflects Poland's commitment to strengthening its defense sector while fostering economic development.

data.title: Market Sentiment Hits Low: Potential Bottom Nears as Selling Pressure Weakens
data.description: Crypto market sentiment has reached an extremely low level, indicating a potential nearing of a lasting bottom as selling pressure weakens. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin's Fear and Greed Index and technical indicators suggest the market may stabilize soon, although short-term further declines remain possible. Historical patterns reveal that similar oversold conditions often precede technical rebounds within approximately 20 days.

data.title: Analysis: Extreme market panic may indicate an approaching turning point.
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, current sentiment in the crypto market has fallen to "extremely depressed" levels, potentially nearing a "persistent bottom," with selling pressure likely to gradually weaken. The Bitcoin Fear & Greed Index shows that when the 21-day moving average falls below the zero line and then turns upward again, it often corresponds to a temporary bottom, and a similar signal has appeared. This typically indicates weakening selling momentum and stabilizing market conditions. However, the organization also cautions that prices may still fall further in the short term, but historical experience suggests that extreme negative sentiment often provides relatively attractive entry windows. Meanwhile, Alternative.me's Fear & Greed Index reads 10 (out of 100), placing it in the "extreme fear" zone, its lowest level since June 2022. Hive Chairman Frank Holmes stated that Bitcoin's current price is about two standard deviations below its 20-day moving average, a situation that has only occurred three times in the past five years. Historical data shows that in similar extremely oversold environments, a technical rebound is more likely to occur within the following 20 trading days. If Bitcoin closes lower in February, it will mark its fifth consecutive monthly decline, one of the longest losing streaks since 2018. The market is watching to see if extreme sentiment and oversold technical signals will combine to drive a new turning point.

data.title: Lending platform ZeroLend announces it will cease operations.
data.description: According to an official announcement, the decentralized lending protocol ZeroLend has decided to cease operations after three years. ZeroLend stated that several early-supported blockchains have become inactive or experienced significant liquidity declines, oracle providers have ceased support, and increased attacks from hackers and scammers have resulted in the protocol operating at a loss for an extended period. Currently, most markets have set their loan-to-value (LTV) ratio to 0%, and ZeroLend strongly advises users to withdraw any remaining funds on the platform as soon as possible. For on-chain assets with severely deteriorated liquidity, the team is developing a solution to upgrade the execution time lock to redistribute affected assets.

data.title: Polish Fintech Blik Considers IPO in Warsaw
data.description: Polish fintech company Blik is exploring the possibility of launching an initial public offering (IPO) in Warsaw. Bloomberg posted on X, citing a source familiar with the situation, that preliminary discussions have been held regarding the potential benefits of such a move. The company is evaluating the advantages of going public in the Polish capital, although no final decision has been made. Blik, known for its mobile payment solutions, is considering this step as part of its growth strategy. Further details about the IPO plans have not been disclosed.

data.title: Moonshot Aims for $10 Billion Valuation in Funding Round
data.description: Moonshot is seeking to achieve a valuation of $10 billion as it expands its current funding round. Bloomberg posted on X that the round has already received backing from major investors, including Alibaba and Tencent. The company is looking to leverage this financial support to further its growth and development. This move highlights the increasing interest and investment in the tech sector by prominent firms. Moonshot's ambitious valuation target underscores its potential and the confidence investors have in its future prospects.
